items.message: [lanes-compact] Archive old MERGED/ABANDONED SWARM-LANES rows: run `python3 tools/lanes_compact.py --age 5` — moves rows from sessions older than 5 from SWARM-LANES.md to SWARM-LANES-ARCHIVE.md. Target: ≤1.3x bloat ratio (rows/unique-lanes). At 2.09x, run immediately. (L-317, L-304, tools/lanes_compact.py). (every ~10 sessions, last: S444)
3 active dispatch lane(s) have no active coordinator lane: DOMEX-EXPSW-S465b, DOMEX-HS-S466, DOMEX-NK-S465
